top_findings.title: Independent test/coverage gate scored 0.294, far below a passing suite
top_findings.evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.2941 (TypeScript scorer parses jest --coverage statement %). Agent _agent_stdout.log claims 'All 16 tests pass' but the independent scorer recorded ~29.4%, so a fully-passing, well-covered run (=1.0) is not demonstrated. This was the repair task's explicit success criterion.
top_findings.suggestion: Re-run `npx jest --coverage` in a clean checkout, confirm 16/16 actually pass on a freshly rebuilt better-sqlite3 binary, and raise statement coverage (server.ts and error/404 handlers are uncovered).
